title: Say Goodbye to Oily Skin with 8 Herbal Creams for Oily Hair
description: Geranium maculatum creams are a natural remedy that can help with oily skin. The plant's properties include its ability to balance hormones, which can contribute to oily skin. Geranium maculatum contains constituents like beta-phellandrene and geraniol, which have a regulating effect on the skin's oil production. When applied topically, these constituents help to normalize the skin's oil levels, reducing the appearance of excess oil and shine. To use Geranium maculatum creams for oily ...
